title: Bird's AE2-GUI Pack
description: An AE2 theme resourcepack for the gui.
body:
***Warning : Some of the GUI of vanilla are not the final version.***

**As a fan of AE2 , I really want to unity the style by the confortable GUI.**

  Light blue is basic color and it is used most boardly in AE2. But I think purple is also suitable for a high-technology mod . So some of buttons are colored by light purple . There has been a doubt that it doesn't support Jei fron now on , but it's comming soon.
  This pack will be more perfect when I am free. As a student in grade 10 , I'm not sure whether I have more time to do this.<font color=cyan>**It's common to find textures that have not been changed.**</font> 

  *Send your suggestions or bugs for the pack to 3627296277@qq.com*.
